reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_206]]
Speaker 1: This is a cross‑ocean faculty collaboration, with both sides working together to deliver the highest‑quality academic programs for students in China.

[[BLOCK:srt_207]]
Speaker 2: One of the greatest advantages of partnering with Beacon Education (彼岸教育) is that

[[BLOCK:srt_208]]
Speaker 2: we can bring together the very best professional resources and expertise from both sides.

[[BLOCK:srt_209]]
Speaker 2: We are a university deeply committed to academic excellence and student success, while Beacon Education has a strong grasp of students’ real‑world needs and ensures their voices are fully heard. Together, this enables us to design more thoughtful teaching formats, instructional approaches, and course content—so what we offer truly meets their needs.

[[BLOCK:srt_210]]
Speaker 3: Thank you for sharing this achievement and honor with us.

[[BLOCK:srt_211]]
Speaker 3: From your perspective, what role do you see Golden Gate University playing in China’s higher education landscape?

[[BLOCK:srt_212]]
Speaker 1: We hope to continue offering truly valuable programs to students in China, while continually evolving to stay closely aligned with their needs and expanding the range of courses we provide.

[[BLOCK:srt_213]]
Speaker 1: Looking ahead, we will continue to strengthen our presence in China and move forward.

[[BLOCK:srt_214]]
Speaker 3: Is there anything else you would like to add?

[[BLOCK:srt_215]]
Speaker 3: All right, let’s move on to the next question.

[[BLOCK:srt_216]]
Speaker 3: Golden Gate University also actively encourages online students to travel to San Francisco to attend the commencement ceremony.

[[BLOCK:srt_217]]
Speaker 3: Why do you believe attending the commencement ceremony in person is such an important milestone for students?
